_comment: SQLTriage query metadata. Loaded by SqlQueryRepository at startup with FileSystemWatcher hot-reload. Edit via Settings page or directly.

_schema.file: relative path under Data/Sql/ to the .sql file
_schema.severity: CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW | INFO (Information-level findings — excluded from Quick Check scoring)
_schema.status: working | broken | deprecated — broken checks skipped at load; resolves 343 vs 489 count ambiguity via per-check flag
_schema.quick: boolean — included in Quick Check ≤60s subset (Information-priority auto-excluded)
_schema.audience: array of dba|it|exec — who sees the translated finding
_schema.governance: optional per-check scoring override {categoryWeight?: number, perFindingCap?: number} — primary scoring binds to check_id, category mapping lives in source check YAML (not in governance-weights.json)
_schema.controls: array of compliance control IDs (SOC2-CC6.1, HIPAA-164.312, ...)
_schema.timeoutSec: optional per-check command timeout; defaults to Settings value

VA-001.description: Validates recent backup existence and restore verification per DB
